text:
On Sun, May 21, 2000 at 10:28:43PM -0700, obrien@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: mail/mutt-1.2i use its own static libintl
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
> State-Changed-By: obrien
> State-Changed-When: Sun May 21 22:26:22 PDT 2000
> State-Changed-Why: 
> I will NOT make mutt depened on the devel/gettext port as I HATE the GTK
> *&%^ and anything associated with it.  Making it depend on devel/gettext
> will do nothing but make my life as maintainer harder.

I don't get it. Can you elaborate ?
